mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_id AS senderId, sender_username AS senderUsername, sender_avatar AS senderAvatar, receiver_id AS receiverId, receiver_username AS receiverUsername, content, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt FROM message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT id, sender_id AS senderId, sender_username AS senderUsername, sender_avatar AS senderAvatar, receiver_id AS receiverId, receiver_username AS receiverUsername, content, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt FROM message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50
